codedeploy.deploymentgroup.greenfleetpro: Information about the instances that belong to the replacement environment in a blue/green deployment.

codedeploy.deploymentgroup.greenfleetpro.Description: The method used to add instances to a replacement environment.  +  `DISCOVER_EXISTING`: Use instances that already exist or will be created manually.+  `COPY_AUTO_SCALING_GROUP`: Use settings from a specified Auto Scaling group to define and create instances in a new Auto Scaling group.
